'''âg-d-ch''' ('''kagadach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrille|quadrille]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrille|quadrille]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-d-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kagadach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadach|thigadach]] || [[word:jigadach|jigadach]] || [[word:shigadach|shigadach]] || [[word:kigadach|kigadach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadach|thuthugadach]] || [[word:jujugadach|jujugadach]] || [[word:shushugadach|shushugadach]] || [[word:kukugadach|kukugadach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadach|thugadach]] || [[word:jugadach|jugadach]] || [[word:shugadach|shugadach]] || [[word:kugadach|kugadach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadach|thugadach]] || [[word:jugadach|jugadach]] || [[word:shugadach|shugadach]] || [[word:kugadach|kugadach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadach|thegadach]] || [[word:jegadach|jegadach]] || [[word:shegadach|shegadach]] || [[word:kegadach|kegadach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadach|thothogadach]] || [[word:jojogadach|jojogadach]] || [[word:shoshogadach|shoshogadach]] || [[word:kokogadach|kokogadach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadach|thogadach]] || [[word:jogadach|jogadach]] || [[word:shogadach|shogadach]] || [[word:kogadach|kogadach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadach|thogadach]] || [[word:jogadach|jogadach]] || [[word:shogadach|shogadach]] || [[word:kogadach|kogadach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgadach|thĂŠgadach]] || [[word:jĂŠgadach|jĂŠgadach]] || [[word:shĂŠgadach|shĂŠgadach]] || [[word:kĂŠgadach|kĂŠgadach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadach|thathagadach]] || [[word:jajagadach|jajagadach]] || [[word:shashagadach|shashagadach]] || [[word:kakagadach|kakagadach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadach|thagadach]] || [[word:jagadach|jagadach]] || [[word:shagadach|shagadach]] || [[word:kagadach|kagadach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadach|thagadach]] || [[word:jagadach|jagadach]] || [[word:shagadach|shagadach]] || [[word:kagadach|kagadach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagadach|shagadach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadach|goshagadach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadach|gokishagadach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadachnĂŒ|shagadachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadachnknĂŒ|goshagadachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadachnĂŒ|gokishagadachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadachshĂ«|shagadachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadachnkshĂ«|goshagadachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadachshĂ«|gokishagadachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadachro|shagadachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadachnkro|goshagadachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadachro|gokishagadachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadachmu|shagadachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadachnkmu|goshagadachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadachmu|gokishagadachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadachsher|shagadachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadachnksher|goshagadachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadachsher|gokishagadachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadachng|shagadachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadachnkng|goshagadachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadachng|gokishagadachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadachya|shagadachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadachnkya|goshagadachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadachya|gokishagadachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadachyam|shagadachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadachnkyam|goshagadachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadachyam|gokishagadachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadachnĂŒshĂ«|shagadachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagadachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagadachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadachnĂŒro|shagadachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadachnknĂŒro|goshagadachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadachnĂŒro|gokishagadachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadachnĂŒmu|shagadachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadachnknĂŒmu|goshagadachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadachnĂŒmu|gokishagadachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadachshĂ«nĂŒ|shagadachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagadachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagadachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadachshĂ«ro|shagadachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadachnkshĂ«ro|goshagadachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadachshĂ«ro|gokishagadachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadachshĂ«mu|shagadachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadachnkshĂ«mu|goshagadachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadachshĂ«mu|gokishagadachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadachronĂŒ|shagadachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadachnkronĂŒ|goshagadachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadachronĂŒ|gokishagadachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadachroshĂ«|shagadachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadachnkroshĂ«|goshagadachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadachroshĂ«|gokishagadachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadachromu|shagadachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadachnkromu|goshagadachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadachromu|gokishagadachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadachmunĂŒ|shagadachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadachnkmunĂŒ|goshagadachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadachmunĂŒ|gokishagadachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadachmushĂ«|shagadachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadachnkmushĂ«|goshagadachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadachmushĂ«|gokishagadachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadachmuro|shagadachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadachnkmuro|goshagadachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadachmuro|gokishagadachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
